transcript: Speaker A: Ye thamb. Ithe call kelas na, tar pakka jeb khali honar. [Hey stop. If you call here, your pocket will definitely get empty.] Speaker B: Ka re? English tar shikaychi aahe promotion sathi. [Why? I need to learn English for promotion.] Speaker A: Pan he sakle outdated classes astta. Saglyanna ekach goshta shikavtat. He sod, tu SpeakX try kar. Ha AI teacher tuza level check karun tya pramaney practice karun gheil. Ani te pan fakt 10% kharchat. Ghar basun, aplya speed ne shik. [But these are all outdated classes. They teach everyone the same thing. Leave this, try SpeakX. This AI teacher will check your level and make you practice accordingly. And that too at just 10% of the cost. Learn from home at your own speed.] Speaker B: Bhau he tar best deal aahe. Aatach karto. [Brother, this is the best deal. I'll do it right now.]
on_screen_text: Ye thamb [Hey stop] ithe call kelas na [if you call here] tar pakka jeb khali honar [then your pocket will definitely get empty] Ka re? [Why?] English tar shikaychi aahe promotion sathi [I need to learn English for promotion] Pan he sakle [But all these] outdated classes astta [are outdated classes] saglyanna ekach [everyone is taught] goshta shikavtat [the same thing] SpeakX 10% kharche [10% cost] Ghar basun, aplya [Sitting at home, at your own] Bhau he tar [Brother, this is] best deal aaths karto [the best deal, doing it now] Speak english naturally SpeakX by Yellow Class Download now
summary: A young man planning to join an expensive English coaching class is stopped by his friend, who warns him about high costs and outdated teaching methods. The friend recommends SpeakX, an AI-powered app that offers personalized learning at 10% of the cost. Convinced, the man decides to download the app immediately.
